meanings.usage: 指在硬物上刻字或图案
指大象的长牙，也可指类似质地的物质

meanings.meaning: 令人困惑的；使人眼花缭乱的
meanings.usage: 形容数量多或复杂让人难以理解
根据已知信息进行逻辑推理得出结论
指重要事件或时期的到来
找出两个或多个事物之间的相互关系
用图画或文字描述某人或某事
没有固定住所、逐水草而居的人
指发展过程中的一个阶段，或月亮的盈亏
帮助解决问题或找到答案的信息
使某事更易理解或解释
耕种土地、生产农作物的活动

examples.en: Future historians will be in a unique position when they come to record the history of our own times.
examples.zh: 未来的历史学家在着手记录我们这个时代的历史时，将处于独特的地位。

examples.en: They will be able, as it were, to see and hear us in action.
examples.zh: 可以说，他们将能够看到和听到我们的一举一动。

examples.en: Even seemingly insignificant remains can shed interesting light on the history of early man.
examples.zh: 即使是看似不重要的遗迹也能揭示早期人类历史的有趣线索。

examples.en: Up to now, historians have assumed that calendars came into being with the advent of agriculture.
examples.zh: 到目前为止，历史学家一直认为日历是随着农业的出现而产生的。

examples.en: It has long been known that the hunting scenes depicted on walls were not simply a form of artistic expression.
examples.zh: 人们早已知道，墙上描绘的狩猎场景不仅仅是艺术表现形式。

examples.en: They have found that it is connected with the passage of days and the phases of the moon.
examples.zh: 他们发现它与日月的推移和月相有关。

examples.en: For then man was faced with a real need to understand something about the seasons.
examples.zh: 因为那时人类确实需要了解季节的变化。

examples.en: It seems that man was making a real effort to understand the seasons 20,000 years earlier than has been supposed.
examples.zh: 看来人类早在人们想象的2万年前就在努力了解季节的变化了。

examples.en: What is more, they will not have to rely solely on the written word.
examples.zh: 更重要的是，他们不必完全依赖文字记载。

examples.en: It is, in fact, a primitive type of calendar.
examples.zh: 实际上，这是一种原始的日历。

grammar.title: 将来完成进行时 (Future Perfect Continuous)
grammar.definition: 表示在将来某一时刻之前已经开始并持续进行的动作，强调动作的持续性。
grammar.structure: 主语 + will have been + 动词-ing
grammar.usage: 用于强调一个从过去开始、持续到将来某时的动作

examples.en: By the time they finish, they will have been working for ten hours.
examples.zh: 到他们完成时，他们将已经工作了十个小时。

grammar.title: 现在完成时 (Present Perfect)
grammar.definition: 表示过去发生的动作或存在的状态，对现在造成影响或持续到现在。
grammar.structure: 主语 + have/has + 过去分词
grammar.usage: 用于描述过去的动作或状态与现在的联系，或从过去持续到现在的情况

examples.en: Historians have long been puzzled by dots, lines and symbols.
examples.zh: 历史学家长期以来对点、线和符号感到困惑。

examples.en: Recent scientific evidence seems to indicate that this assumption is incorrect.
examples.zh: 最近的科学证据似乎表明这个假设是不正确的。

grammar.title: 名词性从句 (Noun Clauses)
grammar.definition: 由连接词引导的从句，在句中起名词作用，可作主语、宾语、表语等。
grammar.usage: 用于表达复杂的概念或思想，使句子更加正式和学术化

examples.en: What is more, they will not have to rely solely on the written word.
examples.zh: 更重要的是，他们不必完全依赖文字记载。

examples.en: What is the importance of the dots, lines, and symbols?
examples.zh: 这些刻在石头、骨骼和象牙上的点、线和符号有什么重要意义？

original.en: What is more, they will not have to rely solely on the written word.
original.zh: 更重要的是，他们不必完全依赖文字记载。

imitations.en: What is more, he is also a talented musician.
imitations.zh: 更重要的是，他还是一个有才华的音乐家。

imitations.en: What is more, the price is very reasonable.

sentencePatterns.pattern: Even + 形容词/副词比较级 + 主语 + 动词...

original.en: Even seemingly insignificant remains can shed interesting light on the history of early man.
original.zh: 即使是看似不重要的遗迹也能揭示早期人类历史的有趣线索。

imitations.en: Even small mistakes can lead to serious consequences.
imitations.zh: 即使是小的错误也可能导致严重的后果。

imitations.en: Even a slight change can make a big difference.
imitations.zh: 即使微小的改变也能产生很大的不同。

sentencePatterns.pattern: It seems that + 主语 + 动词...

original.en: It seems that man was making a real effort to understand the seasons.
original.zh: 看来人类是在努力了解季节的变化。

imitations.en: It seems that the weather is getting worse.
It seems that she has already finished the work.
imitations.zh: 看来她已经完成了工作。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + have/has long been + 过去分词...

original.en: It has long been known that the hunting scenes depicted on walls were not simply a form of artistic expression.
original.zh: 人们早已知道，墙上描绘的狩猎场景不仅仅是艺术表现形式。

imitations.en: It has long been believed that practice makes perfect.
imitations.zh: 人们一直相信熟能生巧。

imitations.en: It has long been recognized that education is important.
imitations.zh: 人们早就认识到教育的重要性。
